transcript.text:
Hello, it's Tzuyang
Some of you have already seen it, but
Seoul local metro buses started playing my mukbang videos starting July 1st
It's all thanks to your support that everyone can enjoy my mukbang videos even on the bus
Thank you so much
There's currently an event going on if you see these videos on the bus
Download the app 'Busjok'
And scan the QR code located on the bottom right of the video
There are a variety of gifts you can win
Enjoy my mukbang videos on the bus
And I hope you win the prizes as well
Thank you~
Don't fall in love What?
I can't?
[Tuna]
[Tuna will give me butterflies]

[You..]
[Giggles]
[The glossiness]
[Completely fell in love]
I don't need any dipping sauce
[Tuna is the best!!]
Hello everyone
I'm here at a tuna restaurant near my shop
I heard that they're doing some good deeds here at Dongjak District
So I'm here to introduce that to you guys
If you eat at these 11 businesses chosen by the district,
you can purchase a cultural experience ticket for just 1,000 Won (~$0.86 USD)
You get to experience a lot of different activities through this program
So I'm going to eat some tuna and try that out afterward
Let's head in now because I'm hungry
['Kim Jong Gu Chamchi Baksa' located in Sadang, Dongjak district]

Hello~!
Hello, welcome in
I've been waiting for you Really?
Excuse me,
How do I order the tuna?
It's all-you-can-eat tuna no matter what parts you want
I don't eat 1 serving though
It's okay because it's AYCE
Well, I eat a lot
Charge me as 3-people at least
We'll get bashed for it
No, I will get bashed
No way
Just charge her for 2-people then
There's no need
What would you like?

Most expensive
You don't need to do that
I want that
I eat a lot
Okay, I'll prepare the food for you
[I'll show you how it's done]
[Sushi as an appetizer]
[Sliced into a certain thickness]
[Tuna flower has bloomed]
I'm hungry
Sushi!
Thank you
Tuna sushi at the tuna restaurant
Looks delicious
Akami (back meat)
[Giggles]

The texture is amazing
It's been a while since I had tuna and it makes me so happy
This is mainly O-toro (belly meat)
This one is mostly the head meat since you said you liked this
[All 3 plates are out]
It's AYCE, so enjoy
Thank you, sir
[Happy]
Where do I start?
I don't know a lot of these parts
Never seen them before
Maybe I have, but I just don't know
Belly meat
So good
Crunchy
The white part is crunchy

It's so good
I know this one
What was it?
Which one is this?
Jaw meat?
Tasty
Red
Which one's this?
Cheek meat
Cheek meat?
I really can't tell I get confused with the red meats
Soy sauce
So good
It's like beef
Red ones
This one's really red It's like steak tartare

Which one's this?
Is this not steak tartare?
That's near the gills
Is that so?
This really tastes like steak tartare
[How do you like it?]
[Eating well today]
Do the side dishes come out after?
Yes, after you have some of the sashimi
Since the side dishes are mostly hot
It comes out in the middle
Back meat
Soft
It's so soft
Here's some uni (sea urchin)
I love it

It's really good without any sauce
Do I eat it with tuna? You can if you want
Thank you
Don't fall in love What?
I can't?
Let's try it by itself first
Do you sell this too?
It's so good
Let's try it with tuna this time
Don't even need soy sauce
The combination is amazing
Let's cut it up
It's so wasteful to eat the whole thing I only have 1 left
[Did you fall in love?]
[That love glare]
The uni is not bitter and it's so savory

What's this?
I thought I knew a good amount, but I guess not
Also from the head
I know the names, but I can't tell
I've been to lots of tuna restaurants But this is delicious
I can't eat it fast because I want to savor it
2 pieces
Just have a look at this
I like it when it's somewhat melted
I'll be coming here for tuna now
On dried seaweed
A bit of wasabi
[Nom Nom]
Even the wasabi tastes good
Really no need for other dipping sauces
I've never seen a pattern like this Very round

It melts in my mouth
[A genuine reaction]
This swordfish belly is much crunchier than regular belly meats
I used to only like fatty meats
But now I enjoy eating these red parts
My taste buds are changing
Look at the marbling on this
Snowflakes
What's this?
Kama toro (back cheek)
This is swordfish belly, right?
Very crunchy
I'm surprised
This is really good too
Tastes like beef Will it turn into beef if I cook it?
Together

[Make some noise]
3 pieces
[Pianist Tzuyang]
The non-fatty meats are very savory The more you eat, the better it gets
The fatty ones are really good for first bites
[A tuna conductor now]
Let me know if you need more
[I would like that] [but tuna is expensive] [and I feel bad]
I'll finish this up first
Thank you
How's the texture like this?
It shocks me every time
This one looks tattered, but it's good
[I must have more...]
I feel bad for eating more
No, it's okay No worries

I feel bad...
Mouth... gill... meat
And what else?
And the cheek meat
A bit of that, and...
Swordfish belly as well, please
[Have this while you wait]
Thank you
After you eat the tuna fatty meats,
Have a bite of this when it feels greasy
Very nice
[Even better this time]
Thank you
Please let me know if you need more
Thank you
Peas...

[Picking them out as quickly as possible]
This is real cheese
What is this?
[Seared swordfish belly] Does it come out like this?
[It's part of the course]
Thank you
I can't fill my belly up with just tuna
That's a delicacy
That's all meat
There's skin on it too
It's really delicious
It's not dry at all
Soft
And it's a bit sticky
This is all meat?
Braised dish this time

It's called Braised Radish, but it has tuna inside
It's even better
[Where did the radish go?]
I don't like cooked radish because it's soggy
And also because of its bitterness
But this is delicious
I prefer this one more
I must come here for tuna from now on
It's all done
[More from the chef]
Is that rib eye?
This one's near the mouth/gills
I can taste the difference in the texture
Thank you
Shrimp tempura
Fresh out of the kitchen

It's so tender
Sweet pumpkin
It's sweet
Thank you
Roe stew? Yes
Did you want Maki (seaweed roll) or rice with fish eggs?
Fish eggs? I'd love that
It's perfect
Here's the rice Thank you
[Can you hear that beautiful sound?]
You have to mix it with chopsticks
If you don't, the rice will stick together and it won't taste as good
It seems too hot right now, so let's set that aside
Let's take the big roe
[Cooling it down with a cold piece of tuna sashimi]
Rice with eggs

[Just a sec, gotta eat]
[Ahjussi?]
Last bite
[Satisfied]
Would you like some more?
I have dinner plans What?!
[Just laugh]
I'm happy because you enjoyed it
It was a great meal
Thank you
Charge 3-people, please
No way, we're AYCE, so it'll be charged as 1 person
Okay fine, 2 people No
That was way more than 1 person's worth
No, it's really fine
Then next time... Wait, I can't come here too often then

I will bring my workers here when Covid dies down
Do you have the coupon?
Do I just take this and make a reservation? Yes
As long as you have the coupon and 1,000 Won ready (~$0.86 USD)
Let's take this to see what's there
I'm headed towards the cultural experience place
There are 10 different activities you can experience you can choose from
Take the coupon and 1,000 Won to experience it
I came to try the cooking class
Let's head in
[Baking Studio, Alliance]
Hello~!
Can I take the class with this coupon and 1,000 Won?
That's correct
Here you go Thank you
Let's get ready to get started

[Washing hands]
[Ready]
Let's make the dough
Sprinkle on the bottom and also on the top
I'm going to do Doraemon!
Press it down and turn it a little bit
[Here to cheer her on]
You're just a little baby by the looks of it
It's pretty~!
It came out nice
Finished~!
If you happen to be in the area of Dongjak district, come eat delicious foods and
get your coupon to try out different cultural activities for just 1,000 Won
It'd be perfect if you have spare time before a movie or something
[Go ahead and try them yourselves!]
Tasty!
